creator: dwmalone@maths.tcd.ie
text:
On Mon, Nov 26, 2001 at 02:18:29AM -0800, Jake Bishop wrote:
 > What is the status of bug #28418.
 
 Not alot seems to have been done about it, but I recently bought
 an A7A266 motherboard and it seems to work fine with my Voodoo3
 card. I wonder what version of X the submitter was using?
 
 There have also been a couple of fixes for bugs in the AGP code in
 FreeBSD recently - I wonder if there could be related?
 
 	David.
